name: Silent Cascade
additional_info: Landing 8 weapon attacks or Silentheart abilities grants the Silent Cascade status effect, allowing you to use the Silent Cascade attack. This effect lasts 30 seconds or until you use Silent Cascade. Deals 7.5 Oath damage per hit (6).
desc: Landing physical attacks on an opponent charges up your Silent Cascade, a devastating barrage that can be released with CTRL + M2.
